starts.name: Inheritor of the Lake
starts.desc:
The patterns on your skin trace the same winding paths as the one who came before. They left you little: a name half-remembered, a debt of dreams, and the NX-A - a vessel that should not run, yet does, humming with something that watches back.

You tell yourself the ship is only a ship.

Begin with the NX-A and little else, out on the quiet fringe where the lake's reflection never quite matches the sky.
